metadata.description: Financial cost transparency for the manuscript appendix. Addresses TRIPOD-LLM Item 12 (computational cost reporting) and GitHub Issue #795. Adds instance type param logging, spot vs on-demand savings computation, and cost appendix LaTeX table in the biostatistics flow.
metadata.existing_infrastructure: metric_keys.py: cost/ prefix defined (cost/total_usd, cost/gpu_hourly_rate) infrastructure_timing.py: SkyPilot setup timing parser analytics.py: DuckDB in-process SQL over mlruns

task.name: Instance type and cost param logging
task.description:
Extend MLflow param logging to include cloud instance metadata:
- cost/instance_type: e.g., "g2-standard-4" (GCP L4) - cost/gpu_type: e.g., "L4" (from SkyPilot env or NVIDIA driver) - cost/spot_enabled: true/false - cost/spot_hourly_rate: $/hr for spot instance - cost/ondemand_hourly_rate: $/hr for on-demand (for savings calc) - cost/region: e.g., "europe-north1" - cost/provider: e.g., "gcp"
These are logged at training start from SkyPilot environment variables (SKYPILOT_TASK_ID, etc.) or from a cost_config.yaml.
IMPORTANT: Do NOT hardcode rates. Read from config or SkyPilot metadata. Different labs use different providers and instance types.
task.acceptance_criteria: - All cost params logged to MLflow at step=0 - Params read from environment or config (no hardcoding) - Missing env vars produce "unknown" (not error) - Slash-prefix convention (cost/instance_type)

task.name: Spot vs on-demand savings computation
task.description:
Add compute_spot_savings() that aggregates cost data from MLflow runs and computes:
1. Total spot cost: sum(cost/total_usd) across all factorial runs 2. Hypothetical on-demand cost: sum(hours × ondemand_hourly_rate) 3. Spot savings: (on_demand - spot) / on_demand × 100% 4. Debug vs production cost breakdown 5. Per-model-family cost breakdown
Output: CostSummary dataclass with all fields for the appendix table.
Uses DuckDB to aggregate from the biostatistics database.

tdd_spec.tests: test_spot_savings_computation test_spot_savings_percentage test_cost_breakdown_by_phase test_cost_breakdown_by_model test_cost_summary_dataclass test_cost_summary_from_duckdb

task.acceptance_criteria: - Savings percentage is correct (verified with known inputs) - Debug vs production phases separated - Per-model breakdown sums to total - DuckDB query returns correct aggregations

task.name: Cost appendix integration into biostatistics flow
task.description:
Wire the cost reporting into the biostatistics flow as an additional output artifact. The biostatistics flow already generates LaTeX tables — add the cost appendix table as Table T6 (alongside existing T1-T5).
The cost table (from PR-A T6) receives data from this PR's CostSummary.
Also generate a cost figure: stacked bar chart showing cost breakdown by model family (X) with stacked segments for training/post-training/eval.
Integration points: - biostatistics_flow.py: add task_compute_costs() task - biostatistics_tables.py: cost table generation (from PR-A) - biostatistics_figures.py: cost breakdown figure - biostatistics_lineage.py: add cost_summary to lineage manifest
task.acceptance_criteria: - Cost task added to biostatistics flow DAG - Cost figure saved as PNG + JSON sidecar - Lineage manifest includes cost_summary field - Flow still passes with zero-cost data (local runs)
